channel.title: Introducing the New Series of Videos "Frontity Talks"
channel.description:
We are happy to share with you an initiative we’ve been working on recently: **Frontity Talks**, a new **series of videos** created by our DevRel team (@juanma and @mburridge) to explain different topics and concepts about Frontity.
Read more on these sessions and how **you can suggest topics** for the next videos in our blog post:
https://frontity.org/blog/introducing-the-new-series-of-videos-frontity-talks/?utm_source=forum&utm_medium=devrel-talks-post&utm_campaign=announcements
As always, feel free to reach out with any questions you might have! :)

item.title: Introducing the New Series of Videos "Frontity Talks"
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
We are happy to share with you an initiative we’ve been working on recently: Frontity Talks, a new series of videos created by our DevRel team (@juanma and @mburridge) to explain different topics and concepts about Frontity.

Read more on these sessions and how you can suggest topics for the next videos in our blog post:

Frontity – 8 Jul 20

Introducing the New Series of Videos "Frontity Talks"

Introducing Frontity Talks, a series of videos created by our DevRel team with the goal of explaining different topics about Frontity.

As always, feel free to reach out with any questions you might have!

Read full topic
item.source: Introducing the New Series of Videos "Frontity Talks"
